PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?seriesLabel ?episodeLabel ?date WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P144 wd:Q128133 .
  ?series rdfs:label ?seriesLabel .
  ?episode wdt:P179 ?series ; wdt:P577 ?date ; rdfs:label ?episodeLabel .
  FILTER(?date > NOW ())
  FILTER(lang(?seriesLabel) = 'en' && lang(?episodeLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 1
